'''''Riptide''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]]. ''Riptide,'' along with her sister [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Havok]]'' attempted to destroy the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during negotiations with the [[Habassa]] delegates. ''Riptide'' and ''Havok'' were destroyed on that attempt by combined efforts of the ''[[Birkby]]'' group of [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] and Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Riptide'' appears in a mission during the [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing|expansion]] to the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
